title: Password Input
description: Password entry control (input type="password") with optional reveal toggle and requirements helper text.

states.name: reveal
effects: Input switches to type="text"; toggle reflects state.

states.name: focus-visible
effects: Show focus ring using semantic border focus token.

states.name: invalid
effects: Show error text and aria-invalid; do not rely on color alone.

keyboard: Reveal toggle is a button reachable via Tab.
Enter submits the surrounding form when appropriate.
aria: Reveal toggle has an accessible name ("Show password" / "Hide password").
Requirements helper text is linked via aria-describedby.
Use autocomplete="new-password" for sign-up and "current-password" for sign-in.

must: Password input must support password managers (autocomplete).
Reveal toggle must not expose password unexpectedly (default hidden).
should: Requirements are shown as helper text and validated on blur/submit.
Strength indicators are optional and must not rely on color alone.
must_not: Do not block paste into password field (supports password managers).

token_usage.notes: Use surface background for password control.
